images.title: Évolution du préleveur d'eau radioguidé SPEEDoo dans les vagues (Ifremer 00378-48941 - 1413).jpg
images.description:
SPEEDoo is a marine drone from Ifremer. This device, measuring 1 meter long and 30 cm wide, has multiple equipment allowing it to both take water samples at sea and measure in situ the basic physicochemical elements (temperature, salinity, etc.) of the water. It is used for the numerous samples taken along the French coast, the aim of which is to describe the ecological state of coastal water masses.

Its range is 500 meters. It is able to pass through waves without turning around, even in difficult weather conditions.

These photographs were taken near Petit Minou beach.
